title: volvulus krauseanus
intro: Volvulus krauseanus, also known as the Krause's twist flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Volvulus krauseanus include its ability to relieve digestive issues, such as nausea, cramps, and diarrhea, as well as reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
